category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a tool for building Kubernetes attack paths; official GitHub repository describes KubeHound as a Kubernetes attack graph tool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is kubehound; official repository and documentation use the display name KubeHound.
docs_sources: Official repository links kubehound.io and the site identifies itself as KubeHound documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/DataDog/KubeHound, so repository was not re-determined.
